Layout.name: FAT Page item

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "level" ; 3 ) & SetProperty ( "server_mode" ; "Preview" ) & SetProperty ( "package_dir" ; FAT Package::Export Package Sub Path ) & SetProperty ( "package_friendly_id" ; FAT Package::JSON Friendly id ) & SetProperty ( "package_type_name" ; FAT Package::Package type name )
IsEmpty (FAT Title::Base project) Or IsEmpty (FAT Package::Local export type)
"View all media with subtitles in title"
"View all text styles defined in title"

SetProperty ( "fat_title_id" ; FAT Title::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "funkis_cloud_title_id" ; FAT Title::Funkis Cloud Title id ) & SetProperty ( "title_environment" ; FAT Title::Title Environment )
FAT Title::Title isLive Or FAT Title::Title Backend ≠ "Funkis Cloud"
Not FAT Title::Title isLive Or FAT Title::Title Backend ≠ "Funkis Cloud"
Not FAT Block @ Page item::Page item List enabled And Not FAT Block @ Page item::List enabled

StyledText.Data: <<Media PI 2::Container original filename>> Width <<Media PI 2::Container width>> px. Height: <<Media PI 2::Container height>> px. Size: <<Media PI 2::Container file size readable>> Modified: <<Media PI 2::Container modified>>

Calculation.Text: FAT Block @ Page item::Number of media containers <2
Not FAT Page item::Include in export
(Not PatternCount ( FAT Title::Tags levels ; "Page item" ) And Count ( FAT Score variable::PrimaryKey )=0) Or isTranslator
"Add a new block directly after current block"
FAT Page item::gBlock = "" Or isEditor Or isTranslator
FAT Page item::gBlock = "" Or isEditor Or isTranslator
"Explore blocks that can be added to this page"
FAT Page item::gBlock ≠ "" Or isEditor Or isTranslator
isDeveloper = False Or IsEmpty ( <Table Missing>::<Field Missing>)
notDeveloper Or FAT Block @ Page item::BlockTemplate id= ""
"Change current page item to a new block type"
FAT Page item::gBlock = "" Or isEditor Or isTranslator
"Copy the URL to this page item"
"View all page items in Title using this List"
"View all page items in Title using this block"
FAT Block @ Page item::Number of media containers < 2
FAT Block @ Page item::Number of media containers < 2
FAT Block @ Page item::Number of media containers <1
FAT Block @ Page item::Number of media containers <1

StyledText.Data: <<Media PI 1::Container original filename>> Width <<Media PI 1::Container width>> px. Height: <<Media PI 1::Container height>> px. Size: <<Media PI 1::Container file size readable>> Modified: <<Media PI 1::Container modified>>

Calculation.Text: FAT Block @ Page item::Number of media containers <1
FAT Block @ Page item::Number of media containers <1
"Play in the browser's native video player with possibility to full screen"
"Play in the browser's native video player with possibility to full screen"
Not SubtitleMedia ( Media PI 1::Container file extension )
Not SubtitleMedia ( Media PI 2::Container file extension )
Not FAT Block @ Page item::Page item List enabled And Not FAT Block @ Page item::List enabled Or isTranslator
Not FAT Block @ Page item::Page item List enabled Or Not FAT Block @ Page item::List enabled Or isTranslator
Not FAT Block @ Page item::Page item List enabled Or isTranslator Or FAT Page item::List id
Not FAT Block @ Page item::Page item List enabled Or isTranslator Or FAT Page item::List id
FAT Block @ Page item::Number of media containers < 2
FAT Block @ Page item::Number of media containers <1

StyledText.Data: <<FAT Block @ Page item::Label override List header>>

Calculation.Text: Not FAT Block @ Page item::Page item List enabled And Not FAT Block @ Page item::List enabled

FAT Block @ Page item::Page item List enabled * 4 + FAT Block @ Page item::List enabled * 2 + GetAsBoolean (FAT Page item::List id) = 0 Or FAT Block @ Page item::Page item List enabled * 4 + FAT Block @ Page item::List enabled * 2 + GetAsBoolean (FAT Page item::List id) = 1 Or FAT Block @ Page item::Page item List enabled * 4 + FAT Block @ Page item::List enabled * 2 + GetAsBoolean (FAT Page item::List id) = 2 // See list layoutitems Excel in Funkis Development for explanation
FAT List item @ Page item::Media 1 id
FAT Block @ Page item::Label override List Media
FAT Block @ Page item::List number of media containers < 1
FAT Block @ Page item::Label override List Media
FAT Block @ Page item::List number of media containers < 1
SetProperty ( "list_item_id" ; FAT List item @ Page item::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "caller" ; "Page item List" )

LayoutObject.name: T1

Calculation.Text: FAT Block @ Page item::Label override List Text 1
Length ( Self ) > BlockTemplate @ Page item::List Text 1 max characters And BlockTemplate @ Page item::List Text 1 max characters>0

LayoutObject.name: T1

Calculation.Text: FAT Block @ Page item::Label override List Text 1
Length ( Self ) > BlockTemplate @ Page item::List Text 1 max characters And BlockTemplate @ Page item::List Text 1 max characters>0

FAT Block @ Page item::Page item List enabled * 4 + FAT Block @ Page item::List enabled * 2 + GetAsBoolean (FAT Page item::List id) < 4 Or FAT Block @ Page item::Page item List enabled * 4 + FAT Block @ Page item::List enabled * 2 + GetAsBoolean (FAT Page item::List id) = 7 // See list layoutitems Excel in Funkis Development for explanation /*FAT Page item::List id or not FAT Block @ Page item::Page item List enabled*/

TableOccurrenceReference.name: FAT List item @ List @ Page item
FAT List item @ List @ Page item

Calculation.Text: FAT List item @ List @ Page item::Media 1 id
FAT Block @ Page item::Label override List Media
List template @ Page item::Number of media containers < 1
FAT Block @ Page item::Label override List Media
List template @ Page item::Number of media containers < 1
SetProperty ( "list_item_id" ; FAT List item @ List @ Page item::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "caller" ; "Title List" )

LayoutObject.name: DisplayTextOrValue

TableOccurrenceReference.name: FAT List item @ List @ Page item

Calculation.Text: FAT Block @ Page item::Label override List Text 1
Length ( Self ) > BlockTemplate @ Page item::List Text 1 max characters And BlockTemplate @ Page item::List Text 1 max characters>0
FAT List item @ List @ Page item::Include in export = 0

LayoutObject.name: DisplayTextOrValue

TableOccurrenceReference.name: FAT List item @ List @ Page item

Calculation.Text: FAT Block @ Page item::Label override List Text 1
Length ( Self ) > BlockTemplate @ Page item::List Text 1 max characters And BlockTemplate @ Page item::List Text 1 max characters>0
FAT List item @ List @ Page item::Include in export = 0
FAT List item @ List @ Page item::NumberOfScoreConditions = 0
FAT List item @ List @ Page item::NumberOfScoreValues = 0
FAT List item @ List @ Page item::NumberOfScoreConditions = 0
FAT List item @ List @ Page item::NumberOfScoreConditions = 0
FAT List item @ List @ Page item::NumberOfScoreValues = 0
FAT List item @ List @ Page item::NumberOfScoreConditions = 0

FAT Block @ Page item::Page item List enabled * 4 + FAT Block @ Page item::List enabled * 2 + GetAsBoolean (FAT Page item::List id) < 2 Or FAT Block @ Page item::Page item List enabled * 4 + FAT Block @ Page item::List enabled * 2 + GetAsBoolean (FAT Page item::List id) = 4 Or FAT Block @ Page item::Page item List enabled * 4 + FAT Block @ Page item::List enabled * 2 + GetAsBoolean (FAT Page item::List id) = 5 Or FAT Block @ Page item::Page item List enabled * 4 + FAT Block @ Page item::List enabled * 2 + GetAsBoolean (FAT Page item::List id) = 6 // See list layout items Excel in Funkis Development for explanation /*(IsEmpty(FAT Page item::List id) and FAT Block @ Page item::Page item List enabled) or not FAT Block @ Page item::List enabled*/
Not PatternCount (BlockTemplate @ Page item::Name; "Sprig") And Not PatternCount ( FAT Block @ Page item::Name ; "Quiz") Or isTranslator
Not PatternCount ( FAT Block @ Page item::Name ; "Activity")

StyledText.Data: Find all page items using the same:

ScriptReference.name: Go block instances ƒ Page item

Calculation.Text: "View all page items in Title using this block"
"View all page items in Title using this List"
IsEmpty ( FAT Page item::List id ) Or isTranslator
Not PatternCount(FAT Block @ Page item::Name; "Sprig story") Or isTranslator

ScriptReference.name: Create and add List to PI

Calculation.Text: Not FAT Block @ Page item::List enabled Or FAT Page item::List id Or isTranslator
"View all page items in Title using this IO"
isTranslator Or Not FAT Block @ Page item::IO enabled Or Count(IO Block Template @ Page item::PrimaryKey) > 0 Or IsEmpty ( FAT Page item::IO id Legacy )

StyledText.Data: <<IO Block Template @ IO Value::Label>> • <<IO Block Template @ IO Value::Function>> • <<FAT IO @ Page item::<Field Missing>>>
<<IO Block Template @ IO Value::Label>> • <<IO Block Template @ IO Value::Function>> • <<FAT IO @ Page item::<Field Missing>>>
Click an IO to view all occurences in this Title

Calculation.Text: "View all page items in Title using this IO"
isTranslator Or Not FAT Block @ Page item::IO enabled Or Count(FAT IO @ Page item::PrimaryKey) = 0

ScriptReference.name: View card Page item IO setting

Calculation.Text: isEditor Or isTranslator Or Not FAT Block @ Page item::IO enabled
SetProperty ( "caller" ; "Page item" ) & SetProperty ( "view_block" ; FAT Page item::Block id )

SetProperty ( "title_id" ; FAT Title::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "item_type" ; "Page item" ) & SetProperty ( "item_id" ; FAT Page item::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "link_type" ; "Internal" ) & SetProperty ( "link_name" ; "Link to page item " & FAT Page item::DisplayText )
"Create a link to this page item"
FAT Link @ Page item::PrimaryKey Or isTranslator Or isEditor

SetProperty ( "title_id" ; FAT Title::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "item_type" ; "Page item" ) & SetProperty ( "item_id" ; FAT Page item::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "link_type" ; "Internal" ) & SetProperty ( "link_name" ; "Link to page item " & FAT Page item::DisplayText )
"Create a link to this page item"
IsEmpty ( FAT IO Value @ Media PI 1::PrimaryKey )

SetProperty ( "clone_level" ; "Page item" ) & SetProperty ( "item_id" ; FAT Page item::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "item_parent_id" ; FAT Page item::Parent id ) & SetProperty ( "item_description" ; FAT Page item::DisplayText ) & SetProperty ( "item_sortindex" ; FAT Page item::SortIndex )
"Duplicate the current page item with all content and settings"
Not FAT Page item::Include in export
SetProperty ( "caller" ; "Page item" ) & SetProperty ( "view_block" ; FAT Page item::Block id )

LayoutObject.name: Modifier Portal

Calculation.Text: FAT Modifier @ Page item::Unprettified name ≠ "Block Duration" And FAT Modifier @ Page item::Unprettified name ≠ "Block Label" And FAT Modifier @ Page item::Unprettified name ≠ "Block Thumbnail" And FAT Modifier @ Page item::Importance = 1 And PrivilegeAccess ( FAT Modifier @ Page item::Privilege ) /*and versionCheck ( Baseproject Codebase Version @ Package::Version string ; FAT Modifier @ Page item::Codebase version Introduced ; FAT Modifier @ Page item::Codebase version Deprecated )*/

LayoutObject.name: Media inout

Calculation.Text: FAT Modifier @ Page item::Type ≠ "Media" Or Not SubtitleMedia ( Media MV PI::Container file extension )
FAT Modifier @ Page item::Type ≠ "Value list radio" Or ValueCount ( FAT Modifier @ Page item::ValuesList) <3
FAT Modifier @ Page item::Type ≠ "Value list radio" Or ValueCount ( FAT Modifier @ Page item::ValuesList) > 2

SetProperty("title_id"; FAT Link MV @ Page item::Title id) & SetProperty("link_type"; FAT Link MV @ Page item::Link type) & SetProperty("item_id"; FAT Link MV @ Page item::Internal Item id) & SetProperty("item_type"; FAT Link MV @ Page item::Internal item type) & SetProperty("link_url"; FAT Link MV @ Page item::Link ModifierValue)

"Link behaviour: " & FAT Link MV @ Page item::Link behaviour & "¶" & "Item type: " & FAT Link MV @ Page item::Internal item type & "¶" & "URL: " & FAT Link MV @ Page item::Link ModifierValue & "¶" & "Click to follow link."
FAT Modifier @ Page item::Type ≠ "Link" Or IsEmpty ( FAT ModifierValue @ Page item::Value )
FAT Modifier @ Page item::Type ≠ "Color" Or Platform ≠ "Desktop"

FAT Modifier @ Page item::Type ≠ "String" And FAT Modifier @ Page item::Type ≠ "Prettified string" And FAT Modifier @ Page item::Type ≠ "URL encoded string" And FAT Modifier @ Page item::Type ≠ "Number" And FAT Modifier @ Page item::Type ≠ "Sync server path"
FAT Modifier @ Page item::Type ≠ "Value list checkbox"

StyledText.Data: <<FAT Modifier @ Page item::Description>> Input type: <<FAT Modifier @ Page item::Type>> Access: <<FAT Modifier @ Page item::Privilege>>

ScriptReference.name: View card Page item IO setting

Calculation.Text: isEditor Or isTranslator Or Not FAT Block @ Page item::IO enabled

SetProperty ( "title_id" ; FAT Title::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "item_type" ; "Page item" ) & SetProperty ( "item_id" ; FAT Page item::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "link_type" ; "Internal" ) & SetProperty ( "link_name" ; FAT Page item::DisplayText & " - Link")
"Create a link to this page item"
FAT Link @ Page item::PrimaryKey Or isTranslator Or isEditor

SetProperty ( "title_id" ; FAT Title::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "item_type" ; "Page item" ) & SetProperty ( "item_id" ; FAT Page item::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "link_type" ; "Internal" ) & SetProperty ( "link_name" ; "Link to page item " & FAT Page item::DisplayText )
"Create a link to this page item"
SetProperty ( "caller" ; "Page item legacy" ) & SetProperty ( "io_id" ; FAT Page item::IO id Legacy )
"View all page items in Title using this IO"
isTranslator Or Not FAT Block @ Page item::IO enabled Or Count(IO Block Template @ Page item::PrimaryKey) > 0 Or IsEmpty ( FAT Page item::IO id Legacy )

StyledText.Data: Click a page item that is connected to this Page item via IO.

Calculation.Text: "Show all page items using the same IOs"
isTranslator Or Not FAT Block @ Page item::IO enabled Or Count(FAT IO @ Page item::PrimaryKey) = 0
Not PatternCount (BlockTemplate @ Page item::Name; "Sprig") And Not PatternCount ( FAT Block @ Page item::Name ; "Quiz") Or isTranslator
Not PatternCount ( FAT Block @ Page item::Name ; "Activity Link")
Not PatternCount(FAT Block @ Page item::Name; "Sprig story") Or isTranslator
SetProperty ( "tab_name" ; "tab1" ) & SetProperty ( "field" ; GetFieldName ( FAT Page item::LastAdaptiveSettingsTab ))
SetProperty ( "tab_name" ; "tab2" ) & SetProperty ( "field" ; GetFieldName ( FAT Page item::LastAdaptiveSettingsTab ))
SetProperty ( "tab_name" ; "tab3" ) & SetProperty ( "field" ; GetFieldName ( FAT Page item::LastAdaptiveSettingsTab ))
"Select for which IO context this tag should work in"
PatternCount (JSONGetElement ( FAT Tag Value @ PI::Tag Value JSON ; "valuelist_id" ) ; "funkis-cloud")
"How will this page item behave if the user doesn't have the tag active?"
"Select a logic operator when combining multiple tags."
Count ( FAT Score variable::PrimaryKey )=0 Or isTranslator
Count ( FAT Score variable::PrimaryKey )=0 Or isTranslator
"View all page items in Title using this List"
"View all page items in Title using this block"

ScriptReference.name: Go block instances ƒ Page item

Calculation.Text: "View all page items in Title using this block"
"View all page items in Title using this List"
IsEmpty ( FAT Page item::List id ) Or isTranslator
SetProperty ( "caller" ; "Page item legacy" ) & SetProperty ( "io_id" ; FAT Page item::IO id Legacy )
"View all page items in Title using this IO"
isTranslator Or Not FAT Block @ Page item::IO enabled Or Count(IO Block Template @ Page item::PrimaryKey) > 0 Or IsEmpty ( FAT Page item::IO id Legacy )
SetProperty ( "caller" ; "Page item" ) & SetProperty ( "io_id" ; FAT IO Value @ Page item::IO id )

StyledText.Data: <<IO Block Template @ IO Value::Label>> • <<IO Block Template @ IO Value::Function>>
<<IO Block Template @ IO Value::Label>> • <<IO Block Template @ IO Value::Function>>
Click an IO to view all occurences in this Title

Calculation.Text: "View all page items in Title using this IO"
isTranslator Or Not FAT Block @ Page item::IO enabled Or Count(FAT IO @ Page item::PrimaryKey) = 0

StyledText.Data: Find all page items using the same:
No sub editor available for this block.

Calculation.Text: PatternCount(FAT Block @ Page item::Name; "Sprig story") Or PatternCount ( FAT Block @ Page item::Name ; "Activity Link") Or PatternCount ( FAT Block @ Page item::Name ; "Quiz")
notDeveloper Or FAT Block @ Page item::BlockTemplate id= ""

StyledText.Data: Copy and paste page item texts

Calculation.Text: Not FAT Page item::Include in export
"Add a new block directly after current block"
FAT Page item::gBlock = "" Or isEditor Or isTranslator
FAT Page item::gBlock = "" Or isEditor Or isTranslator
"Explore blocks that can be added to this page"
FAT Page item::gBlock ≠ "" Or isEditor Or isTranslator
SetProperty ( "caller" ; "Page item" ) & SetProperty ( "view_block" ; FAT Page Block VL::PrimaryKey )
"Change current page item to a new block type"
FAT Page item::gBlock = "" Or isEditor Or isTranslator

StyledText.Data: This block may not work with the current codebase. Consider exchanging it for another block or change codebase. This package is running: <<Baseproject Codebase @ Package::Name>> <<Baseproject Codebase Version @ Package::Branch string>> Block codebase: <<BlockTemplate @ Page item::Codebase Name>> Block version info: <<BlockTemplate @ Page item::Codebase Version info>>

CharacterStyle.Text: <<Baseproject Codebase @ Package::Name>> <<Baseproject Codebase Version @ Package::Branch string>>

LayoutObject.name: PI navigation

Calculation.Text: IsEmpty ( FAT Tag Value @ PI::PrimaryKey ) And FAT List @ Page item::NumberOfTagValues = 0 And FAT Page item::PI LI NumberOfTagValues = 0
IsEmpty ( FAT Score Value @ PI::PrimaryKey ) And FAT List @ Page item::NumberOfScoreValues = 0 And FAT Page item::PI LI NumberOfScoreValues = 0
IsEmpty (FAT Score Condititon @ PI::PrimaryKey) And FAT List @ Page item::NumberOfScoreConditions = 0 And FAT Page item::PI LI NumberOfScoreConditions = 0
IsEmpty ( FAT Tag Value @ PI::PrimaryKey ) And FAT List @ Page item::NumberOfTagValues = 0 And FAT Page item::PI LI NumberOfTagValues = 0
IsEmpty ( FAT Score Value @ PI::PrimaryKey ) And FAT List @ Page item::NumberOfScoreValues = 0 And FAT Page item::PI LI NumberOfScoreValues = 0
IsEmpty (FAT Score Condititon @ PI::PrimaryKey) And FAT List @ Page item::NumberOfScoreConditions = 0 And FAT Page item::PI LI NumberOfScoreConditions = 0

IsEmpty (FAT Page item::IO id Legacy) And IsEmpty (FAT Page item::IO id array Legacy) And IsEmpty (FAT IO @ Page item::PrimaryKey) And IsEmpty (FAT IO @ List item @ PI::PrimaryKey) /*or not BlockTemplate @ Page item::IO enabled*/
SetProperty ( "numberOfChildrenField"; GetFieldName ( FAT Page::Number of page items )) & SetProperty ( "sortField"; GetFieldName ( FAT Page item::SortIndex )) & SetProperty ( "action"; "up")
isEditor Or isTranslator Or Get(ActiveRecordNumber) ≠ Get(recordNumber) Or Get(recordNumber) = 1 Or FAT Page::Proxy type ≠ ""
SetProperty ( "numberOfChildrenField"; GetFieldName ( FAT Chapter::Number of pages )) & SetProperty ( "sortField"; GetFieldName ( FAT Page::SortIndex )) & SetProperty ( "action"; "up")
isEditor Or isTranslator Or Get(ActiveRecordNumber) ≠ Get(recordNumber) Or Get(recordNumber) = 1 Or FAT Page::Proxy type = ""
SetProperty ( "numberOfChildrenField"; GetFieldName ( FAT Page::Number of page items )) & SetProperty ( "sortField"; GetFieldName ( FAT Page item::SortIndex )) & SetProperty ( "action"; "up")
isEditor Or isTranslator Or Get(ActiveRecordNumber) ≠ Get(recordNumber) Or Get(recordNumber) = 1 Or FAT Page::Proxy type ≠ ""
SetProperty ( "numberOfChildrenField"; GetFieldName ( FAT Chapter::Number of pages )) & SetProperty ( "sortField"; GetFieldName ( FAT Page::SortIndex )) & SetProperty ( "action"; "up")
isEditor Or isTranslator Or Get(ActiveRecordNumber) ≠ Get(recordNumber) Or Get(recordNumber) = 1 Or FAT Page::Proxy type = ""
SetProperty ( "numberOfChildrenField"; GetFieldName ( FAT Page::Number of page items )) & SetProperty ( "sortField"; GetFieldName ( FAT Page item::SortIndex )) & SetProperty ( "action"; "down")
isEditor Or isTranslator Or Get(ActiveRecordNumber) ≠ Get(recordNumber) Or Get(recordNumber) = Get(foundCount) Or FAT Page::Proxy type ≠ ""
SetProperty ( "numberOfChildrenField"; GetFieldName ( FAT Chapter::Number of pages )) & SetProperty ( "sortField"; GetFieldName ( FAT Page::SortIndex )) & SetProperty ( "action"; "down")
isEditor Or isTranslator Or Get(ActiveRecordNumber) ≠ Get(recordNumber) Or Get(recordNumber) = Get(foundCount) Or FAT Page::Proxy type = ""
SetProperty ( "numberOfChildrenField"; GetFieldName ( FAT Page::Number of page items )) & SetProperty ( "sortField"; GetFieldName ( FAT Page item::SortIndex )) & SetProperty ( "action"; "down")
isEditor Or isTranslator Or Get(ActiveRecordNumber) ≠ Get(recordNumber) Or Get(recordNumber) = Get(foundCount) Or FAT Page::Proxy type ≠ ""
SetProperty ( "numberOfChildrenField"; GetFieldName ( FAT Chapter::Number of pages )) & SetProperty ( "sortField"; GetFieldName ( FAT Page::SortIndex )) & SetProperty ( "action"; "down")
isEditor Or isTranslator Or Get(ActiveRecordNumber) ≠ Get(recordNumber) Or Get(recordNumber) = Get(foundCount) Or FAT Page::Proxy type = ""

SetProperty ( "clone_level" ; "Page item" ) & SetProperty ( "item_id" ; FAT Page item::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "item_parent_id" ; FAT Page item::Parent id ) & SetProperty ( "item_description" ; FAT Page item::DisplayText ) & SetProperty ( "item_sortindex" ; FAT Page item::SortIndex )
"Duplicate the current page item with all content and settings"
SetProperty ( "caller" ; "Page item" ) & SetProperty ( "view_block" ; FAT Page Block VL::PrimaryKey )

LayoutObject.name: WebViewer Quill

StyledText.Data: IMPORTANT! To make interaction of this portal work in WebDirect: No grouped items in portal Text fields - such as media filename positioned in the bottom.
